expectations.text: Output is a single valid HTML file (has <!DOCTYPE html> and closing </html>)
File contains a design rationale comment block documenting source material, detected niche, preserved elements, and improvements
expectations.evidence: Lines 1-54 contain full comment block with Source Material, Detected Niche, Preserved Elements, and Improvements Made sections

expectations.text: Tailwind CSS is loaded via CDN script tag
The exact name 'Elena Vasquez' appears in the output
expectations.evidence: Elena Vasquez appears in h1, nav logo, title, meta tags, and footer

expectations.text: Page includes a grid of portfolio photos (at least 6 img elements with Unsplash or placeholder URLs)
expectations.evidence: Exactly 6 img elements with Unsplash URLs inside the portfolio grid

expectations.text: Page includes a contact form with at least name, email, and message fields
expectations.evidence: Form contains name, email, and message fields

expectations.text: Contact form has JavaScript validation (required fields, email format check)
expectations.evidence: JS submit handler validates all three fields including email regex /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/

expectations.text: Page includes an About section with bio content
expectations.evidence: <section id='about'> with two bio paragraphs present

expectations.text: A serif font is used (Google Fonts import or font-serif Tailwind class)
expectations.evidence: Google Fonts import for Playfair Display present; applied via inline CSS
All 6 portfolio images have loading="lazy" attribute
